hero.description: A beauty journey inspired by K-Beauty and Japanese Zen philosophy — where modern science meets the essence of nature, caring for you inside and out.

philosophy.label: Our philosophy
philosophy.title: Three pillars of
philosophy.pillar1Desc: Every product is carefully selected from natural herbs — preservative-free and completely safe for sensitive skin.
philosophy.pillar2Desc: Powered by advanced K-Beauty technology: skin type analysis and next-generation nutrient formulas for optimal results.
philosophy.pillar3Desc: Inspired by Japanese Wabi-sabi — appreciating natural beauty, finding peace in every breath.

specialists.label: Our specialists
specialists.title: The golden hands
specialists.description: Each specialist is intensively trained in South Korea and Japan, delivering world-class beauty experiences.

membership.label: Membership plans
membership.title: Choose your perfect plan
membership.description: Save more, get pampered more. Jade Blossom members enjoy exclusive benefits every month.
membership.noContract: All memberships can be cancelled at any time. No binding contracts.

booking.label: Book online
booking.title: Start your
booking.description: Free booking, instant SMS confirmation. Change or cancel anytime.
booking.refundDesc: 100% refund if you are not satisfied after your first session.
